/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,-rpath,'$ORIGIN/../../private' -shared  -o ../../plugin_output_directory/keyring_file.so CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/buffer.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/buffered_file_io.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/checker/checker.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/checker/checker_factory.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/checker/checker_ver_1_0.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/checker/checker_ver_2_0.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/common/keyring_impl.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/common/keyring_key.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/common/keys_container.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/common/keys_iterator.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/converter.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/digest.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/file_io.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/hash_to_buffer_serializer.cc.o CMakeFiles/keyring_file.dir/keyring.cc.o  ../../libservices/libmysqlservices.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a
